title: telis griffithii
intro: Telis griffithii, also known as Telis griffithii, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Telis griffithii include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. Telis griffithii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to extract its active compounds and utilize its medicinal properties.
